title: TagBan
description: A highly configurable mod that disables specific tools and items based on regex patterns. Supports blacklist/whitelist system with visual tooltip feedback.
body:
A highly configurable mod that disables specific tools and items based on regex patterns. Supports blacklist/whitelist system with visual tooltip feedback.
You can modify the whitelist and blacklist in the configuration folder. If you have installed "https://modrinth.com/project/9s6osm5g", you can modify them directly in the mods.
